response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. The video consists of continuous Minecraft gameplay commentary by a VTuber. No vocal music was detected in this segment.
response.global_summary: A video featuring continuous Minecraft gameplay and commentary by the streamer. No vocal music is present throughout the segment.

scenes.description: Continuous Minecraft gameplay. The streamer speaks to the chat and provides commentary on the game. No vocal music is playing.
